text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! And guess what, Mom? I got<n>some fans!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I even got a letter that said, "Your<n>running left a
real impression on me!"<n>Heh, it reminds me of how
popular Dad<n>was!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Huh? Sorry, Mom, the signal's<n>cutting out.
What did you say?<n>...Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! That's right! ♪ I'm everyone's<n>beloved lil'
girly! I'll keep running til the<n>day I make my
dreams come true and<n>come home with a bunch
of trophies!<n>Hehe! ♪
